attacking_style: Opportunistic finisher who capitalizes on moves by others to fracture the field, then delivers a decisive solo attack inside the final kilometer on summit finishes.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to determine clear team tactical patterns from single race observation.
terrain_preference: Final climb summit finishes where he can follow elite climbers' accelerations then counter-attack in the final kilometer when others have committed.
vulnerability: Unknown - insufficient data to identify weaknesses from single race observation.
key_patterns: Follows elite climbers' long-range moves before launching own attack (Evenepoel 6.5km move)
Delivers winning attack inside final 1km after field is pre-fractured
Converts stage win to race lead when positioned correctly on GC stages
form_trajectory: positive: won stage and took race lead at Tour de Suisse with tactically astute performance
